report_name: Ransomware attack on Coca-Cola's Fairlife halts U.S. milk production

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: A ransomware attack encrypted Fairlife's IT and operational technology systems, leading to a complete halt in U.S. production.

attack_patterns.name: Inhibit System Recovery
attack_patterns.description: The ransomware likely inhibited system recovery by deleting volume shadow copies, a common tactic for which hunting hints were provided (e.g., using vssadmin.exe).

tools.name: PsExec
tools.description: The administrative tool PsExec.exe was mentioned as a likely tool used by attackers for lateral movement and ransomware deployment in this type of manufacturing environment.

identities.name: Fairlife, LLC
identities.description: A prominent U.S. dairy brand and subsidiary of The Coca-Cola Company that suffered a ransomware attack, leading to the suspension of all its U.S. production.

identities.name: The Coca-Cola Company
identities.description: The parent company of Fairlife, LLC, which was impacted by the ransomware attack on its subsidiary.

indicators.name: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
id: 2b89f8a2-3b29-4569-8133-21703946a31b
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a common ransomware tactic to inhibit system recovery.
references:
  - https://therecord.media/dairy-company-fairlife-suspends-production-us-cyber-incident
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-17
tags:
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.impact
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a technique associated with ransomware to prevent recovery.

indicators.name: PsExec Execution For Lateral Movement
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: PsExec Execution
id: 9c5b1f3a-8d4e-4f2a-9c7b-0a1b2c3d4e5f
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of PsExec, a legitimate tool often abused by attackers for lateral movement and remote execution.
references:
  - https://therecord.media/dairy-company-fairlife-suspends-production-us-cyber-incident
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-17
tags:
  - attack.t1569.002
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    OriginalFileName: 'psexec.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of PsExec, a tool often used by threat actors for lateral movement, as suggested in the hunting hints for this incident.

indicators.name: Ransom Note File Creation
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Ransom Note File Creation
id: e4d3c2b1-a098-4f3a-8d4e-9c7b0a1b2c3d
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of a file named DECRYPT_INSTRUCTIONS.txt, a common ransom note name.
references:
  - https://therecord.media/dairy-company-fairlife-suspends-production-us-cyber-incident
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-17
tags:
  - attack.t1486
level: high
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '\DECRYPT_INSTRUCTIONS.txt'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of a ransom note file, based on common patterns provided as hunting hints.

indicators.name: BCDEdit To Inhibit System Recovery
indicators.pattern:
title: BCDEdit To Inhibit System Recovery
id: 1a2b3c4d-5e6f-4a9b-8c7d-0e1f2a3b4c5d
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of bcdedit.exe to modify boot configurations, potentially to inhibit system recovery.
references:
  - https://therecord.media/dairy-company-fairlife-suspends-production-us-cyber-incident
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-17
tags:
  - attack.t1490
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\bcdedit.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'deletevalue'
      - 'safeboot'
      - 'recoveryenabled'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the use of bcdedit.exe to disable recovery options, a common ransomware technique.
